name: CFSC Checks Cashed 55th & Fond Du Lac
description_short: CFSC offers check cashing, money transfers, bill payment, and prepaid debit cards at Milwaukee locations without requiring a bank account.
description_long:
CFSC (Community Financial Services) operates multiple check-cashing locations across Milwaukee, including the 55th & Fond Du Lac Ave branch. The company has been serving the Milwaukee community with alternative financial services for those who prefer or need to avoid traditional banking. CFSC positions itself as a convenient alternative for unbanked and underbanked consumers who need immediate access to their funds without monthly fees or account requirements.

The 55th & Fond Du Lac location offers a comprehensive range of money services including check cashing (personal and business checks), money orders, electronic bill pay, money transfers to anywhere in the world, prepaid debit cards (Yes! Debit Account), ATM access, foreign currency exchange (80+ countries), transit/MetroCard purchases, tax refund services, and prepaid cellular phone services. The location operates extended hours Monday through Thursday (8 AM–9 PM), Friday until 10 PM, Saturday 8:30 AM–8 PM, and Sunday 10 AM–5 PM, providing significant accessibility for working customers.

What distinguishes CFSC is its extended operating hours compared to traditional banks, same-day check cashing without waiting for funds to clear, no credit check requirement for prepaid debit cards, no bank account requirement, and a multi-service approach allowing customers to handle several financial tasks in one location. The company also offers services specifically for those with alternative documentation and income sources (business check cashing, tax refund services). Their foreign currency exchange capability and broad geographic footprint across Milwaukee (at least 7 locations) provide additional convenience.

The primary limitation is that CFSC is a check-cashing service, not a full-service bank, so customers don't build traditional banking history or credit relationships. While the company emphasizes "friendly service," specific fees, exchange rates, and competitive comparisons with other check-cashing services are not disclosed on the website. Additionally, though prepaid debit cards are offered, these typically don't build credit history. The service is fundamentally designed for transaction-by-transaction financial management rather than long-term financial planning or relationship banking.
address: 5500 W Fond du Lac Ave, Milwaukee, WI 53216

company_info.headquarters: 5500 W Fond du Lac Ave, Milwaukee, WI 53216

pros: Extended hours including Friday until 10 PM and weekend availability (Sunday 10 AM–5 PM) for working customers
No bank account required for check cashing with just government-issued photo ID
Same-day check cashing without waiting for funds to clear like traditional banks
No credit check required for Yes! Debit prepaid card account
Wide range of services in one location: check cashing, bill pay, money transfers, currency exchange, tax refunds
Foreign currency exchange for 80+ countries at single location
Multiple Milwaukee locations (at least 7 branches) for geographic accessibility
cons: Fee structure not disclosed on website—actual costs for check cashing and services are unknown
Prepaid debit cards and check cashing do not build credit history or traditional banking relationships
No mention of competitive rates or comparison to other check-cashing services
Limited to transaction-based services rather than savings accounts, loans, or investment products
Foreign currency exchange rates not specified and may not be competitive
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals without traditional bank accounts
Workers with irregular schedules needing weekend and late-night financial services
Business owners and self-employed individuals needing to cash business checks quickly
International money senders and travelers needing foreign currency exchange
diagnosis: CFSC's 55th & Fond Du Lac location is best for unbanked or underbanked Milwaukee residents who need immediate check cashing, money transfers, and bill payment without a bank account. The main caveat is that specific fee information is not disclosed on their website, making it impossible to determine cost-competitiveness, and customers should call (414) 875-6617 to confirm current rates and services.
